ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* The position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* The height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the player's contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* The current injury status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* The year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* The name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* The URL or path to the team's logo image */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* The primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach manages */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the coach */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* The date the coach was hired */,
  "dismissal_date" TEXT /* The date the coach was dismissed (if applicable) */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* A list of previous teams the coach has managed */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* The coach's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* A list of referees officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player taking the shot */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the game when the shot was taken */,
  "minutes_remaining" INTEGER /* Minutes remaining in the period at the time of the shot */,
  "shot_made_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the shot was made */,
  "shot_distance" REAL /* Distance from the basket at which the shot was taken */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the shot location */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the shot location */,
  "shot_clock" REAL /* Shot clock reading at the time of the shot */,
  "shot_2pnt" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the shot was a 2-point shot */,
  "shot_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of shot */,
  "shot_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the shot */,
  "assisted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who assisted the shot (if applicable) */,
  "pressure_level" TEXT /* The pressure level under which the shot was taken */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video clip of the shot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_shot_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shot_type_id") REFERENCES shot_types ("shot_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_types" (
  "shot_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shot type (e.g., 2-point, 3-point) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds collected by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* The player's field goal percentage in the game */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* The player's three-point percentage in the game */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* The player's free throw percentage in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* The player's plus-minus rating in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_details" (
  "game_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game detail entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods (if applicable) */,
  "home_team_quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter for the home team */,
  "away_team_quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter for the away team */,
  "home_team_timeouts" INTEGER /* Number of timeouts taken by the home team */,
  "away_team_timeouts" INTEGER /* Number of timeouts taken by the away team */,
  "home_team_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the home team */,
  "away_team_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
